scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build -w shared && npm run dev -w backend
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build -w shared && npm run dev -w frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
